title: The Dead
author: James Joyce

sections.title: The Party Begins
sections.description: Gabriel arrives at the Misses Morkan's annual dance party

sections.title: Dinner and Dancing
sections.description: The feast, conversations, and dancing at the party

sections.title: Gabriel's Speech
sections.description: Gabriel gives his annual speech about hospitality and memory

sections.title: The Journey Home
sections.description: Gabriel and Gretta leave the party and head to their hotel

sections.title: The Revelation
sections.description: Gretta's memories of Michael Furey and Gabriel's epiphany
sections.emotionalTone: devastating revelation, profound sadness, spiritual awakening

guidelines: 5 thematic sections following Joyce's narrative structure, spoiler-free headers, emotional progression from festive to profound
